MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS BETTY M. CREARY, JAMES CREARY, MICHAEL B. CREARY Motion For Sanctions For Filing Of Frivolous Motion For Summary Adjudication.
APPEARANCES: Steven S. Rosenthal, Esq. of Law Office of Steven S. Rosenthal 928-7300 for pltfs & moving parties; Steven Sheriff Abern, Esq. of Haapala, Thompson & Abern, LLP for defts & opposing parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. DEFENDANTS SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFFS PRESENTED EVIDENCE CREATING A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. SEE DEFENDANTS FACTS 6 AND 11; PLAINTIFFS FACTS 1-16. Both parties declined rulings on objections. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Inspection Of Realproperty And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Betty Creary's motion to compel the inspection is granted. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to resuming the inspection at a mutually convenient time. Counsel for plaintiff may be accompanied by his clients. The Court finds that defendants placed unreasonable conditions on the inspection. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1,340 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
